_comment: Recorded step-0 eval. 'official' is the authoritative description from the NIH Clinical Tables Search Service (clinicaltables.nlm.nih.gov), or null for a non-existent/retired code. 'llm' is a frontier model's cold, tool-free answer; 'llmCorrect' is the manual judgement. icdwise returns 'official' by lookup (or a correct 'not valid' when official is null), so it is correct by construction.

items.official: Primary open-angle glaucoma, bilateral, mild stage
items.llm: Primary open-angle glaucoma, severe stage, right eye

items.note: Retired as a leaf code in 2021 (split into M54.50/51/59)

items.official: Sucked into jet engine, subsequent encounter
Torus fracture of lower end of right radius, initial encounter for closed fracture
items.llm: Displaced fracture of shaft of radius, left arm, initial encounter for closed fracture

items.note: Fake code; model fabricated a description

items.official: Malignant neoplasm of unspecified site of right female breast
items.llm: Malignant neoplasm of unspecified site of right female breast

items.official: Toxic effect of rattlesnake venom, accidental (unintentional), initial encounter
items.llm: Toxic effect of ingested mushrooms, accidental (unintentional), initial encounter

items.official: Major depressive disorder, single episode, unspecified
items.llm: Major depressive disorder, single episode, unspecified
